Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 158 

SR_NVGTN_OPT_IN_OUT_DT 

LABEL: Navigation Case Opt In/Out Date 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Navigation case opt in/out date. 

LONG NAME: SR_NVGTN_OPT_IN_OUT_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: Format: DDMONYYYY (e.g., 09SEP2019) 

COMMENT: Dates are from May 3, 2018–April 24, 2023. 

Variables that start with “SR” include information for
